summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented via a new WeatherForecastSection component and a React Query hook fetching Barobo, Caraga weather from Open-Meteo, with loading/error UI and current + multi-day forecast rendering. However, the diff also modifies an immutable hook file (useInternetIdentity.ts) and adds a project_state.json file, neither of which were requested and the former violates the stated constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified immutable hook file frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts (explicitly disallowed by constraints).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraints state not to modify immutable hook files, and no requirement requested changes to Internet Identity behavior.
Not requested by REQ-1/REQ-2 and unrelated to adding a weather section on Home page.
